$comment: Extended in-place 2026-04-26 (Madhav_M2A_Exec_8): added CONTRADICTS-flow event types claude_proposal, gemini_challenge_accept, gemini_challenge_reject. gemini_response_ref made nullable (null allowed for initial claude_proposal events before Gemini adjudication; populated at gemini_challenge stage). New optional fields: hypothesis_id, conflict_type, claude_severity_prior, claude_rationale. All existing v0.1 SUPPORTS events remain valid (additive change only; no migration required). AC.1 decision: extend in-place per brief rule. Extended in-place 2026-04-27 (Madhav_M2A_Exec_9): added B.5 pattern-mining event types pattern_proposal, claude_pattern_accept, claude_pattern_reject. Added optional fields pattern_id (12-char hex), pattern_payload (proposal body). Extended if/then conditional cascade to require pattern_id + decision_basis + reconciler_artifact_ref for claude_pattern_accept and claude_pattern_reject events. Existing v0.1 and Exec_8 events remain valid (additive only). AC.7 decision: extend in-place per brief rule. Extended in-place 2026-04-27 (Madhav_M2A_Exec_10): added B.5 resonance-walk event types resonance_proposal, claude_resonance_accept, claude_resonance_reject. Added optional fields resonance_id (RES.NNN string), resonance_payload (proposal body). Extended if/then conditional cascade to require resonance_id + decision_basis + reconciler_artifact_ref for claude_resonance_accept and claude_resonance_reject events. No field-semantic changes to existing event_types. No version bump (additive). AC.12 decision: extend in-place per brief rule. Extended in-place 2026-04-27 (Madhav_M2A_Exec_11): added B.5 cluster-annotation event types cluster_proposal, claude_cluster_accept, claude_cluster_reject. Added optional fields cluster_id (CLUS.NNN string), cluster_payload (proposal body). Extended if/then conditional cascade to require cluster_id + decision_basis + reconciler_artifact_ref for claude_cluster_accept and claude_cluster_reject events. No field-semantic changes to existing event_types. No version bump (additive). AC.6 decision: extend in-place per brief rule.
title: MARSYS-JIS Two-Pass Ledger Event Schema v0.1
description: Schema for ledger events written by the two-pass edge discovery pipeline (SUPPORTS: Gemini Pass-1 + Claude Pass-2; CONTRADICTS: Claude Pass-1 + Gemini Pass-2). Append-only JSONL at 06_LEARNING_LAYER/LEDGER/two_pass_events.jsonl.

event_id.description: sha256 (12-char prefix) of canonicalized event JSON (computed before writing event_id itself — seeded from batch_id+timestamp+edge_proposal).

event_type.description: SUPPORTS flow: gemini_proposal = raw Gemini Pass-1; claude_reconcile_accept/reject = Claude Pass-2 verdict. CONTRADICTS flow (inverted): claude_proposal = Claude Pass-1 hypothesis; gemini_challenge_accept/reject = Gemini Pass-2 adjudication verdict. PATTERN MINING flow (B.5): pattern_proposal = Gemini Pass-1 pattern hypothesis; claude_pattern_accept/reject = Claude Pass-2 verdict. RESONANCE WALK flow (B.5): resonance_proposal = Gemini Pass-1 resonance hypothesis; claude_resonance_accept/reject = Claude Pass-2 verdict. CLUSTER ANNOTATION flow (B.5): cluster_proposal = Gemini Pass-1 cluster batch; claude_cluster_accept/reject = Claude Pass-2 verdict. REVALIDATION flow (B.5 AC.4): gemini_revalidation_pass1 = Gemini re-validates an existing PAT.* entry.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of event creation.

batch_id.description: Identifier for the Gemini batch this event belongs to (e.g. B4_supports_batch1).

gemini_response_ref.description: Relative path to the raw Gemini response file. Required for all event types. Null is allowed for claude_proposal events before Gemini adjudication; populated when gemini_challenge_* events are written.

hypothesis_id.description: CONTRADICTS-flow only. sha256-truncated-12 identifier of the Claude Pass-1 hypothesis this event relates to. Required for claude_proposal, gemini_challenge_accept, gemini_challenge_reject.

conflict_type.description: CONTRADICTS-flow only. Category of contradiction hypothesis.

claude_severity_prior.description: CONTRADICTS-flow only. Claude's heuristic severity prior for the contradiction hypothesis.

claude_rationale.description: CONTRADICTS-flow only. Claude's rationale for the contradiction hypothesis (claude_proposal events).

reconciler_artifact_ref.description: Relative path to the Claude reconciler output file. Required for claude_reconcile_accept and claude_reconcile_reject events.

edge_proposal.description: The proposed graph edge. Required for all event types.

edge_type.description: Edge type. SUPPORTS generated in Exec_7; CONTRADICTS generated in Exec_8.

l1_source.description: FORENSIC_v8_0 §-citation or 'derivative — l3_evidence_report carries the chain'.

l3_evidence_report.description: Optional. Filename of the L3 report whose narrative chain establishes the SUPPORTS claim.

decision_basis.description: Rationale for accept or reject decision. Required for claude_reconcile_accept and claude_reconcile_reject events.

validator_results.description: Optional per-validator pass/fail results (P1, P2, P5, l3_chain).

accepted_by_session.description: Session ID of the accepting Claude Code session. Required for claude_reconcile_accept events.

edge_id.description: Assigned CGM_SUPPORTS_NNN identifier. Present only on claude_reconcile_accept events after DB persistence.

pattern_id.description: B.5 pattern-mining only. 12-char hex pattern identifier (PAT.NNN assigned after accept). Required for claude_pattern_accept and claude_pattern_reject events.

pattern_payload.description: B.5 pattern-mining only. Optional. The full parsed pattern proposal body from Gemini Pass-1 (for pattern_proposal events) or the accepted/rejected entry (for claude_pattern_accept/reject events).

resonance_id.description: B.5 resonance-walk only. RES.NNN identifier (assigned after accept). Required for claude_resonance_accept and claude_resonance_reject events.

resonance_payload.description: B.5 resonance-walk only. Optional. The full parsed resonance proposal body from Gemini Pass-1 (for resonance_proposal events) or the accepted/rejected entry (for claude_resonance_accept/reject events).

cluster_id.description: B.5 cluster-annotation only. CLUS.NNN identifier (assigned after accept). Required for claude_cluster_accept and claude_cluster_reject events.

cluster_payload.description: B.5 cluster-annotation only. Optional. The full parsed cluster annotation body from Gemini Pass-1 (for cluster_proposal events) or the accepted/rejected entry (for claude_cluster_accept/reject events).
